closest_to_finish_label: {distance_rule_text} Which labeled car is closest to the finish line?
{distance_rule_text} Select the car with the shortest remaining distance to the finish line.
{distance_rule_text} Which car reaches the finish line next?
{distance_rule_text} Report the label of the car nearest to finishing.
{distance_rule_text} Identify the labeled car closest to the finish.
farthest_from_finish_label: {distance_rule_text} Which labeled car is farthest from the finish line?
{distance_rule_text} Select the car with the longest remaining distance to the finish line.
{distance_rule_text} Which car has the most distance left before the finish line?
{distance_rule_text} Report the label of the car farthest from finishing.
{distance_rule_text} Identify the labeled car farthest from the finish.
car_ahead_count: {ahead_rule_text} How many other cars are ahead of the marked car before the finish line?
{ahead_rule_text} Count the other cars between the marked car and the finish line.
{ahead_rule_text} What is the number of other cars ahead of the marked car?
{ahead_rule_text} Report how many labeled cars come after the marked car before the finish.
{ahead_rule_text} Count only the cars ahead of the marked car before the finish line.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_oval_loop: a top-down loop racing track with a checkered finish line, a direction arrow, and labeled cars
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_rounded_loop: a rounded loop racing track with a checkered finish line, a direction arrow, and labeled cars
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_kidney_loop: a curved loop racing track with a checkered finish line, a direction arrow, and labeled cars
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_oval_loop_ahead_count: a top-down loop racing track with a checkered finish line, a direction arrow, a marked car, and other labeled cars
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_rounded_loop_ahead_co: a rounded loop racing track with a checkered finish line, a direction arrow, a marked car, and other labeled cars
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_kidney_loop_ahead_cou: a curved loop racing track with a checkered finish line, a direction arrow, a marked car, and other labeled cars
code_prompt_defaults.distance_rule_text: Measure distance along the track in the arrow direction.
code_prompt_defaults.ahead_rule_text: Follow the arrow direction from the marked car to the finish line. Do not count the marked car.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_closest_to_finish_label: set "annotation" to [x, y], the pixel center of the selected car
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_closest_to_finish_label: set "answer" to the selected car label as a capital letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_farthest_from_finish_lab: set "annotation" to [x, y], the pixel center of the selected car
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_farthest_from_finish_label: set "answer" to the selected car label as a capital letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_car_ahead_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one around each counted car; use an empty array when none qualify
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_car_ahead_count: set "answer" to the integer count of other cars ahead of the marked car before the finish line
